title: fsl-mcp sync: expose the v8 container/ADT/graph surface
manager: Keep fsl-mcp current with v8. Containers, ADTs, streams, function-slots, overlapping groups, and the graph form become authorable, so the MCP's validate/explain/render must understand and describe them for the agent.
cs: Extend fsl_explain / fsl_render for groups and graph:{}; validate container/ADT constructs; surface exhaustiveness diagnostics.
